text: I feel a sense of curiosity and excitement in this environment; the atmosphere seems to buzz with creative energy and focused collaboration. The first space is filled with people deeply engaged in discussion and work, giving me a feeling of belonging to a community driven by ideas. The second image evokes wonder—I am surrounded by vibrant colors and the theme of research and development is clear, prompting me to reflect on the nature of progress and collective inquiry. I feel like an active seeker of knowledge here, eager to participate and contribute.
